title: Dromnyr
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dromnyr''' was the native language of the [[Vultan]] species from [[Vulta]].

Most Vultans were fluent in both Dromnyr and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], being literate in both languages.

Although Vulta was a relatively recent addition to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] (circa [[14,000 BBY]]), Dromnyr language was considered one of the languages that spawned the [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], and thus responsible of some important differences between Basic and its parent language, [[Old Galactic Standard]]

==Notable non-native speakers of Dromnyr==
*[[Shoaneb Culu]]
*[[Thon]]
